g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the custom dashboard SPA fetch data from the BFF?')
sendPrompt('How does a CDN serve static dashboard assets?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the BFF request lifecycle for a tenant dashboard view')
sendPrompt('How does IAM issue JWTs and provide JWKS for BFF validation?')
sendPrompt('How do platform engineers use Grafana with tenant federation for cross-workspace investigation?')
sendPrompt('What audit events does the BFF log?')

svg.text: Tenants: predefined views · no query language exposed
Engineers: Grafana · full PromQL · tenant federation · VPN
